## By-release highlights

Investor narrative source — what shipped at each version.

### pre-v1.0

4 spec(s), 64 test(s)

- **auth.spec.ts** — Verify login, logout, session expiry, account lockout, and first-run admin setup _(18 tests; auth, session)_
- **free-tier-funnel.spec.ts** — Verify free-tier upgrade nags, backend 403s, and conversion touchpoints are all present _(30 tests; funnel, tiers)_
- **network.spec.ts** — Verify network topology page renders heading, bridge chip, and WebSocket status indicator _(12 tests; network, dashboard)_
- **vm-acl.spec.ts** — Verify per-VM ACL API and UI are fabrick-gated, returning 403 and hiding ACL buttons on weaver _(4 tests; authz, tiers, workloads)_

### v1.0.0

26 spec(s), 284 test(s)

- **agent.spec.ts** — Verify AI agent UI (Diagnose/Explain/Suggest) on VM detail drawer and AI Analysis tab _(10 tests; agent, workloads)_
- **audit-ui.spec.ts** — Verify fabrick-tier audit log gating redirects non-fabrick users and API returns 403 _(4 tests; audit, tiers, authz)_
- **console.spec.ts** — Verify lazy-loaded serial console tab renders, empty state, and detail-tab parity _(5 tests; console, workloads)_
- **container-workloads.spec.ts** — Verify Docker/Podman workload registration, list rendering, and start/stop/restart contract _(9 tests; containers, workloads)_
- **dashboard.spec.ts** — Verify Weaver dashboard renders cards, header, sidebar, and WebSocket status chip _(8 tests; dashboard, navigation)_
- **demo-mode.spec.ts** — Verify demo-tier UI hides all weaver/fabrick features via mocked health response _(15 tests; demo, tiers)_
- **demo-screenshots.spec.ts** — Capture marketing screenshots from demo SPA for investor pitch deck and materials _(10 tests; screenshots, demo)_
- **form-validation.spec.ts** — Verify form validation gaps (VM boundaries, bridge names, passwords, port ranges, setup fields) _(12 tests; forms)_
- **help.spec.ts** — Verify Help page nav item, sections (Getting Started, FAQ), and search input _(16 tests; help, navigation)_
- **host-config.spec.ts** — Verify read-only NixOS configuration.nix viewer in Settings renders path and content _(8 tests; host-config, settings)_
- **host-info.spec.ts** — Verify dashboard host-info strip shows hostname, core count, and KVM availability _(10 tests; host-info, dashboard)_
- **keyboard-shortcuts.spec.ts** — Verify global keyboard shortcuts (?/d/s/t/n) navigate correctly and respect input focus _(6 tests; keyboard, navigation)_
- **mobile.spec.ts** — Verify dashboard grid/list toggle and mobile-viewport responsive layout behavior _(5 tests; mobile, dashboard)_
- **notification-config.spec.ts** — Verify admin notification channel config (push channels, resource alerts) in Settings _(16 tests; notifications, settings, rbac)_
- **notifications.spec.ts** — Verify notification bell toolbar icon, panel menu open, and empty-state rendering _(11 tests; notifications)_
- **provisioning.spec.ts** — Verify distro catalog API, VM creation with provisioning fields, and provisioning log endpoint _(18 tests; provisioning, workloads)_
- **rbac.spec.ts** — Verify admin/operator/viewer role access to VM actions, user management, and UI gating _(8 tests; rbac, authz)_
- **screenshots.spec.ts** — Capture marketing screenshots from authenticated E2E backend (weaver tier, real auth) _(7 tests; screenshots)_
- **security.spec.ts** — Verify security headers (Helmet/CSP), rate-limit headers, auth enforcement, JWT rejection _(15 tests; security, auth)_
- **settings.spec.ts** — Verify Settings nav, page rendering, AI Provider section, vendor select, and API key input _(27 tests; settings, navigation)_
- **tags-search.spec.ts** — Verify dashboard search toolbar filters VM cards by name and shows empty state on no match _(9 tests; dashboard, workloads)_
- **tier-gating.spec.ts** — Verify bulk actions, ACL UI, and other fabrick-gated features are hidden on weaver tier _(5 tests; tiers, authz)_
- **users.spec.ts** — Verify admin user management page: list, role change, delete, self-protect, last-admin guard _(12 tests; users, rbac)_
- **vm-crud.spec.ts** — Verify VM create and delete API endpoints enforce admin-only access and return correct shape _(11 tests; workloads, rbac)_
- **vm-dialogs.spec.ts** — Verify Register VM and delete confirmation dialogs through Shed and detail drawer UI _(23 tests; workloads, forms)_
- **vm-scan.spec.ts** — Verify VM scan endpoint discovers microvm/Docker/Podman workloads and Workbench empty-state UI _(4 tests; workloads)_

### v1.0.1

5 spec(s), 93 test(s)

- **demo-private-content.spec.ts** — Verify private demo SPA tier switcher, version stepper, and feature gating across all versions _(38 tests; demo-private, demo, tiers)_
- **demo-public-content.spec.ts** — Verify public demo SPA funnel content, CTAs, FM/contact links, and no API leaks _(35 tests; demo-public, funnel)_
- **license.spec.ts** — Verify Settings License section displays tier badge, description, and current tier info _(7 tests; license, settings, tiers)_
- **smoke.spec.ts** — Basic smoke tests that Quasar app loads, page content renders, and layout is functional _(6 tests; smoke)_
- **stripe-license.spec.ts** — Verify license activation status endpoint and graceful handling when Stripe is unconfigured _(7 tests; license)_

### v1.0.2

## How to add a spec

Every `testing/e2e/*.spec.ts` must carry a JSDoc header with three tags:

```ts
/**
 * @purpose One-line prose, what this spec proves.
 * @feature comma,separated,tags
 * @since v1.0.0 (or pre-v1.0 for legacy)
 */
```

After adding or modifying a spec, run `npm run generate:e2e-coverage`. The `audit:e2e-docs` auditor fails CI if any spec lacks a header or if this file is out of date.
